title: maziyarpanahi/openmed
summary: OpenMed is an open-source, local-first healthcare AI toolkit for clinical named entity recognition, PII detection, de-identification, and specialized biomedical models. It supports Python, Dockerized REST APIs, batch processing, Apple MLX acceleration, and offline or air-gapped operation.
friendlySummary: OpenMed is an open-source healthcare AI toolkit that can identify medical terms and remove private patient information from text while running locally.
whyItMatters: Healthcare teams and builders can use it to extract structured information from clinical text or de-identify sensitive records locally, without sending patient data to a cloud vendor.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for healthcare projects that need privacy. Teams can process clinical text on their own machines or servers instead of sending sensitive data to an outside API.
